mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_intents ( payment_intent_id, psp_reference, buyer_id, order_id, merchant_account, processing_model, total_amount_value, currency, status, splits_json, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{paymentIntentId}, #{pspReference}, #{buyerId}, #{orderId}, #{merchantAccount}, #{processingModel}, #{totalAmountValue}, #{currency}, #{status}, CAST(#{splitsJson} AS jsonb), #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT payment_intent_id, psp_reference, buyer_id, order_id, merchant_account, processing_model, total_amount_value, currency, status, created_at, updated_at, splits_json::text AS splits_json FROM payment_intents WHERE payment_intent_id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_intents SET psp_reference = #{pspReference}, order_id = #{orderId}, buyer_id = #{buyerId}, merchant_account = #{merchantAccount}, processing_model = #{processingModel}, total_amount_value = #{totalAmountValue}, currency = #{currency}, status = #{status}, splits_json = CAST(#{splitsJson} AS jsonb), created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE payment_intent_id = #{paymentIntentId}
